reviews.comment:
La única YPF cercana a Fiambalá, necesaria para cargar combustible a un precio regulado... Lo único que solo tenían infinia... Pero es la opción rentable ya que en Fiambalá solo hay una gasolinera privada y el valor del súper cuesta lo mismo q infinia en esta YPF

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF near Fiambalá, necessary to refuel at a regulated price... The only thing they only had was Infinia... But it is the profitable option since in Fiambalá there is only one private gas station and the value of the supermarket costs the same as Infinia at this YPF
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM2QyNHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
1 hora reloj para que el camión descargue nafta. El aire para inflar cubiertas no funciona. Larguisimas las colas para cargar porque evidentemente faltan playeros. Martes a la tarde no tenían super, solo infinia. Una decepción para ser del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It took a full hour for the truck to unload gasoline. The tire inflator wasn't working. The lines to fill up were incredibly long because they clearly weren't enough attendants. On Tuesday afternoon, they didn't have premium gasoline, only regular. A real disappointment for an ACA station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoajhEUzV3RRAB
